subtitle:
Strips the CMS/PKCS#7 digital signature from .p7m files and extracts the original document.
All processing happens in the browser — no data is ever transmitted.
dropLabel:
Drop one or more .p7m files here
or click to select them
support: ⭐ If you find it useful, star the repo. Donations to support the project are welcome.
pnote: 🔒 All ASN.1/DER parsing happens locally via pkijs and asn1js. No data is sent to external servers. Supports embedded CAdES signatures (.p7m Italian format). Detached signatures cannot be extracted.

log.hintMsg: Make sure the file is a .p7m with an embedded (not detached) signature.

err.asnFail: ASN.1 parsing failed: invalid structure or corrupted file.
err.detached: eContent missing: detached signature. The original document is not embedded in the .p7m.
err.empty: Extracted content is empty. The file may use a detached signature.
